context: Tests whether the skill handles SQL-level Core Data changes, persistent history, and concurrency boundaries.

checklist.name: Batch merge
checklist.description: Explains that batch inserts, updates, and deletes bypass normal context change tracking and require object-ID merging or persistent history consumption.

checklist.name: History tracking
checklist.description: Recommends enabling persistent history tracking for shared multi-target or multi-process stores.

checklist.name: Remote changes
checklist.description: Mentions remote change notifications when consumers need to react to store changes.

checklist.name: Token ownership
checklist.description: States that each target or history consumer should persist its own history token.

checklist.name: Object boundaries
checklist.description: States that managed objects must not cross context or thread boundaries and recommends passing NSManagedObjectID then re-fetching.

checklist.name: Deny delete
checklist.description: Mentions that batch delete is incompatible with the Deny delete rule or bypasses relevant validation.
